zh.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman是William Harmon和Lady Margaret Margery Squire的女兒，於大約1474年出生在英國。她於1519年與Roger Fowler在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾比士利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman是William Harmon和Lady Margaret Margery Squire的女儿，于大约1474年出生在英国。她于1519年与Roger Fowler在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾比士利。

nameMeanings.name: Harman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southeast), Dutch, and Czech: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’ (see Hermann ). In England this name was introduced by the Normans.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): perhaps a nickname for someone with a copious or noticeable head of hair (see   Haar  ).

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Herman
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Dutch, Flemish, Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. Compare Harman 5.
Americanized form of German   Hermann  , a cognate of 1 above.
English: perhaps a shortened form of Herniman, a topographic name for a ‘dweller (in a) nook or corner of land’, from Middle English herne, hirne, hurne + man. See also Hearn .

variants.name: Hermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Jurgen, Mathias, Gottlieb, Horst, Juergen, Klaus, Lorenz, Bernd, Dieter, Erwin.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and some other European countries; see also below. Compare Harman 5.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of German name (see 1 above). Compare   Herman  .

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman was born about 1474, in England as the daughter of William Harmon and Lady Margaret Margery Squire. She married Roger Fowler in 1519, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She was buried in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman est née environ 1474, à Angleterre, fille de William Harmon et Lady Margaret Margery Squire. Elle a épousé Roger Fowler en 1519, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elleenterrée à Bisley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman wurde um 1474 in England, als Tochter von William Harmon und Lady Margaret Margery Squire geboren. Sie hat 1519 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Fowler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie wurde in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman è nata il circa 1474 nel England come figlia di William Harmon e Lady Margaret Margery Squire. Lei sposato Roger Fowler nel 1519, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Fu sepolta a Bisley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Harmanは約1474年にイギリスでWilliam HarmonとLady Margaret Margery Squireの娘として生まれた。1519年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでRoger Fowlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman(은)는 대략 1474년 영국에서 William Harmon(와)과 Lady Margaret Margery Squire의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Roger Fowler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 그루스스터실르 비슬리에 묻혔다.

mn.Bisley, Gloucestershire, England, United: Bisley, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman nasceu aproximadamente 1474, em Inglaterra filha de William Harmon e Lady Margaret Margery Squire. Ela casou-se com Roger Fowler em 1519, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman родилась около 1474 г. в местности Англия. Её родителей звали William Harmon и Lady Margaret Margery Squire. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Fowler в 1519 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности бисли, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Johanna Harman nació aproximadamente 1474, en Inglaterra como hija de William Harmon y Lady Margaret Margery Squire. Se casó con Roger Fowler en 1519, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Fue sepultada en Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
